node.text: Love only to end up marrying!
Par Puja to Radha Krishna ki hoti hai naa
Aur ye Kalyug hai ye sab yahan sach nahi hota

Read/Study; your or a HOLY BIBLE: daily (DAILY) & REMEMBER 🔥There is Only Oneway to GOD: & that is JESUS: Who IS GOD: Still; JESUS: YESHUAH: is GOD: in the Flesh: (REMEMBER) JESUS: is GOD: in the Flesh, read (1John,5:3-21) (1Timothy,3:16) (John,1:14) (John,1:18) (Isaiah,9:6) (Revelation,1:8,11,17-18) (John,1:1-5)• JESUS: is the HOLY: Living Sacrifice & the (ONLY) way to GOD: the Father: the HOLY SPIRIT: read 🔥(John,14:6) “Jesus saith unto him, I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me.”KJV‬‬ • for the blood of JESUS CHRIST: Cleanseth us from (ALL) sin, it’s Written 🔥(1John,1:7) “but if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the blood of Jesus Christ his Son cleanseth us from all sin.”‬ ‭KJV‬‬ ••• you “MUST”  read/study, the HOLY BIBLE: & learn Who JESUS: is; the ONLY-WAY; the ABSOLUTE  TRUTH:  in the Mighty Name; JESUS: of Nazareth • Amen 🙌🏽 •• 🔥(1John,5:20-21) And we know that the Son of God is come, and hath given us an understanding, that we may know him that is true, and we are in him that is true, even in his Son Jesus Christ. This is the true God, and eternal life. Little children, keep yourselves from idols. Amen.”‬ ‭KJV‬‬ • in the Mighty Name; JESUS: of Nazareth 
🔥Amen

node.text:
Kylian Mbappé. Football’s Relentless Force Stuns at 2025 Laureus World Sports Awards 🏆

At the 2025 Laureus World Sports Awards, Kylian Mbappé reaffirmed his place as one of the game’s most dominant and determined figures. Honored for his relentless pursuit of excellence, the French superstar turned the ceremony into a celebration of ambition, discipline, and leadership on and off the pitch. 💪🇫🇷

Renowned for his explosive speed ⚡, razor-sharp instincts 🧠, and cold-blooded finishing 🎯, Mbappé captivated the audience not with tricks, but with a powerful message about dedication and purpose in sport. His brief speech—measured, humble, and inspiring—drew a standing ovation 👏 and reminded the world why he’s more than just a goal scorer.

From dazzling performances in World Cups 🏟️ to leading elite clubs with maturity beyond his years, Mbappé represents the modern footballer: driven, intelligent, and socially conscious.

Supermán = henry cavil
Bruce wayn = Herman drago 🔥
Qué tiene que ver Mbappé con Hernán Drago y Henry Cavill, no se parece a ninguno de los dos ni en lo blanco de los ojos. 🤔🤭
Acho que este maluco, nasceu pra interpretar o super Mem

node.text:
I love you 3000🤍
Tony Stark and Pepper Potts (often called "Pepperony") represent a central, evolving romantic relationship in the MCU, anchored by deep emotional support, with Pepper serving as the grounding, moral compass for Tony's reckless genius. Their journey spans from a professional assistant-boss dynamic to marriage, surviving immense stress, fear, and personal growth. I love you 3000" - Tony Stark"I love you 3000" is an iconic line from Avengers: Endgame (2019) spoken by Morgan Stark to her father, Tony Stark, and later repeated by him. The phrase represents a deep, affectionate bond and was actually inspired by a real-life moment when Robert Downey Jr.'s child said it to him, which he then brought to the script.

node.text:
The moment has arrived! Marie Ruumet steps into the Rajadamnern ring for the inaugural Flyweight title fight against Zaidania Looksaikongdin and the stadium is buzzing! Live NOW on @rwsmuaythai 🔥

MTA Originals #muaythai #muaythaifighter
Wow they are all so beautiful
Oxii oxiii vai tirar sangue ela
The training and discipline aside, I love the tradition and rituals that are clearly part of the process.  Keeps you humble.

#🇯🇵𝙹𝚊𝚙𝚊𝚗 𝚒𝚜 𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚗𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚏𝚘𝚘𝚝𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚙𝚜 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚘 𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚛𝚒𝚌𝚒𝚝𝚢!
 𝚄𝚜𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚙𝚒𝚎𝚣𝚘𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚛𝚒𝚌 𝚝𝚒𝚕𝚎𝚜, 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛𝚢 𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚙 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚝𝚊𝚔𝚎 𝚐𝚎𝚗𝚎𝚛𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚊 𝚜𝚖𝚊𝚕𝚕 𝚊𝚖𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚝 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚗𝚎𝚛𝚐𝚢. 𝙼𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚙𝚜 𝚝𝚘𝚐𝚎𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚌𝚊𝚗 𝚙𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚛 𝙻𝙴𝙳 𝚕𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝𝚜 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚢𝚜 𝚒𝚗 𝚋𝚞𝚜𝚢 𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚌𝚎𝚜 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎 𝚂𝚑𝚒𝚋𝚞𝚢𝚊 𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗. 𝙰 𝚋𝚛𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚒𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚠𝚊𝚢 𝚝𝚘 𝚌𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚎 𝚊 𝚜𝚞𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚜𝚖𝚊𝚛𝚝 𝚌𝚒𝚝𝚢

•  𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚗𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚖…

node.text: I agree one of the best fights too not only the best round… April 21 Costa Paulo’s birthday happy birthday

I am the two witnesses of the Book of Revelation sent by the Lord Jesus Christ, who is with the Jehovah God of Hosts, who created and governs the heavens and the earth and is still alive. Now, wake up, sincerely repent of your sins, and prepare yourselves. Glorious salvation will begin. Amen.
Rev 22: And He said to me, “Do not seal up the words of the prophecy of this scroll, for the time is near.”
I, Jesus, [have] my angel [for the churches]  He sent to testify to you about these things, saying, “I am the root of David, his descendant, and the bright morning star.”
The Spirit and Jesus say, “Come!” And whoever hears, let him say, “Come!” And whoever is thirsty, let him come; and whoever desires, let him take the water of life freely.
He who testifies to these things says, “I am coming soon.” Amen. Come, Lord Jesus.
The grace of the Lord Jesus be with all the saints. Amen.

Offer your heart only to the Lord Jesus Christ. O shot arrow, it shall fly beyond continents, beyond seas, to the ends of the earth.
Warrior, gird your sword at your waist and be clothed with glory and majesty. Mount your horse with dignity and boldness to defend truth and justice, and let your right hand teach you fearful things. Your arrows are sharp and will pierce the hearts of the King’s enemies, and all will submit at your feet.
You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord. Walk as children of light. He has already made preparations to punish all disobedience when your obedience is complete.
My great Father, Jehovah God, the King of Glory to be praised forever, is with me, and the only begotten Son, the King of Kings, the Lord Jesus Christ, who is with me, knows that I do not lie. In the name of Jesus. Amen.
I agree one of the best fights too not only the best round… April 21 Costa Paulo’s birthday happy birthday

node.text:
How does your bank know if you qualify for a loan? 

It usually starts with these algorithms. I made these cheat sheets to break down the "Big 3" of Supervised Learning:

1. Linear Regression: The fortune teller. Used for continuous numbers. Think: Predicting sales for next quarter or estimating travel time.

2. Logistic Regression: The gatekeeper. Used for binary classification. Think: Your inbox filtering out spam or a doctor determining a diagnosis.

3. Decision Tree: The rule maker.
Learns simple if–else rules from data.
Think: Loan approval based on income, credit score, and risk thresholds.

4. Random Forest: The heavy lifter. A powerful ensemble method. Think: Complex credit scoring or ranking feature importance in big data.

💡 Don’t overcomplicate your model. If a simple Linear Regression gets the job done, use it!

#MachineLearningAlgorithms #DataScientist #TechCommunity #BigData #ArtificialIntelligence #Coding #ProgrammingLife #TechTips #CheatSheet #LearnAI

Photo by Simplifying AI on March 18, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of text that says 'Ground Station is full suite for tracking satellites and decoding their radio signals locally. You don't even need the internet. uses an SDR to pull weather images and raw data straight from space to your hard drive. 100% Open Source. License GPLv3 Ground Station Ground Station full-featured, open-source software solution for satellite tracking and radio communication. Designed amateur radio operators, satellite enthusiasts, and researchers, providesa comprehensive easy-to-use platform monitoring spacecraft, controlling radio equipment, and receiving live radio signals from satellites. was Code and Codex. Screenshots help Global Satellite Overview Overview with quick group selection and real-time satellite status indicators'.

node.text:
Ground Station is a full suite for tracking satellites and decoding their radio signals locally. 

You don't even need the internet. It uses an SDR to pull weather images and raw data straight from space to your hard drive. 

100% Open Source.

node.text:
The dark web is often romanticized online…
but most people have no idea what they’re actually getting into.

This video is for educational purposes only.
Do your own research and never trust random links.

Stay safe. Stay smart. 

#cybersecurity #cyber #linux #hacker #hacking
Imagine recommending people to simply use Tor on their PC😂 I hope they have a good antivirus program.

node.text:
I’ve been talking to myself since I was a child, so much that people sometimes hear me and think I’m on a call or with someone, but I’m not. Back then, my parents would stop me and now they just smile and let me be.
It’s my little world, a place where everything feels beautiful and full of wonder. A world where no matter how heavy reality gets, the pain doesn’t follow me there. It’s where I can be completely me, giddy, silly and safe.
Talking to myself has always been my quiet way of holding my own hand, of comforting my heart when the world felt too much. That little world has saved me in ways no one can see. Not every escape is unhealthy, some of them are where your soul learns to breathe and your heart learns to hope again.
As someone who has studied psychology, I might just maybe, be a little concerned, but as a human… I’m grateful for it. 🕊️

@therapywithzainab - There's something poetic about a psychologist who spent years studying the human mind... only to confirm what her 7-year-old self already knew. You didn't need the degree to find the safest room in the house,  you'd already furnished it. Also, lowkey the most unbothered flex: people thought you were on a call, and in a way, you were. Just with the most qualified person in the room. Stay blessed.

You're such an incredibly beautiful angel yet so prettiest with mesmerizing eyes and with hottest body and with extremely beautiful soul and heart just know that protect your heart don't let anyone use and break it cause you're perfect and special more than you think and you're worthy of every blessing and best thing which universe has to offer. Your life your energy your choices truly matters. 
Wishing you all the best in future with lot of success and blessings. Never give up and never forget to smile and shine Queen. 🖤💙
Beautiful habit. Jose Arcadio Buendia also used to talk to himself.
@demotivated.sufi I have no idea who this person is, but he better be something
@therapywithzainab he’s a major character from 100 years of solitude.

@therapywithzainab - There's something poetic about a psychologist who spent years studying the human mind... only to confirm what her 7-year-old self already knew. Just with the most qualified person in the room. Stay blessed.

node.text: He is going to hell don't worry

Surah Al-Furqān (25:31)
“And thus We have made for every prophet an enemy from among the criminals. But sufficient is your Lord as a Guide and Helper.”
Arabic:
وَكَذَٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِيٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ الْمُجْرِمِينَ ۗ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
Surah Al-An‘ām (6:112)
“And thus We have made for every prophet enemies — devils from mankind and jinn, inspiring one another with decorative speech to deceive.”

node.text:
Comment "Learn" and I'll send you the 10 podcasts that will make you dangerous in any room.

The internet hides its best content in plain sight. Hours-long conversations with no clickbait titles, no viral packaging, and ideas that never make the news cycle.

The algorithm was never designed to show you this. It was designed to keep you scrolling.

But the people running the rooms you want to be in found it anyway. This is where they actually get their information.

This list covers the four topics I've seen come up most in rooms with high profile people: history, health, music, and philosophy. 

Not because they're interesting. Because knowing them is what makes you interesting.

ਇਤਿਹਾਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਜਾਵੇਗਾ ਕਿ ਇੰਡੀਆ ਵਿੱਚ ਇੱਕ ਪਾਗਲ ਆਇਆ ਸੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਹੀ ਦੇਸ਼ ਵੇਚ ਦਿੱਤਾ

node.text:
Comment "PURPOSE" and I'll send you the free guide I made after hundreds of hours of podcasts on this exact topic ↓

Most people never find their purpose because they're looking for it in the wrong place, through other people's opinions, career labels, or what sounds impressive. 

These three strategies cut through all of that.

1. The Disappearance Test: Write down your three biggest goals. For each one, ask yourself out loud: "If the person I'm trying to impress disappeared tomorrow, would I still do this?" 

If the answer is no, cut the goal. Most people are chasing things that only matter because someone is watching. This eliminates all of it.

2. The Energy Log: For the next 48 hours, set an alarm every two hours. When it goes off, write down what you were doing and rate your energy from 1 to 10. 

After 48 hours, look for anything you rated an 8 or above. You can't think your way to your purpose but your own behavior will tell you exactly where it lives if you pay attention.

3. The Five Year Test: Write your purpose down in one sentence. Then ask yourself: can I finish this in five years? If you can, rewrite it. 

Real purpose isn't a destination. It's a direction. A goal has a finish line. Purpose doesn't.

These are just the starting points. 

The full guide has seven exercises whether you're just starting out or already have some clarity. Free for the next 48 hours. Comment "PURPOSE" and I'll send it straight to you.

Which subject do you want me to break down next?
